frame_analyses.description: Initial setup showing the trainer with the Penrose drain mounted on the gauze pad with two black marks visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good setup with clear marks for suture placement

frame_analyses.description: Hand positioning the trainer block, task not yet started
Trainer positioned with Penrose drain clearly visible with slit and two marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear view of target marks for suture placement

frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic instruments entering the field with needle holder grasping the needle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task timing begins, proper instrument introduction

frame_analyses.description: Needle being positioned for first pass through the Penrose drain at the left mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good angle of approach to the first mark

frame_analyses.description: Suture being passed through both marks on the Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture placement appears accurate through both target marks

frame_analyses.description: Beginning formation of the first throw, preparing for surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial loop formation for surgeon's knot double throw

frame_analyses.description: Completing the surgeon's knot with double throw using right hand dominance
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper surgeon's knot technique being executed

frame_analyses.description: Beginning second throw with apparent hand switching from first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switching properly executed between throws

frame_analyses.description: Completing second single throw with left hand dominance
Executing third throw with hand switching from second throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final throw being completed with proper hand switching

frame_analyses.description: Positioning scissors to cut the suture ends
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper scissor positioning for suture cutting

frame_analyses.description: Task completed with knot in place and suture ends cut, drain slit appears closed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result shows secure knot with good drain closure

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed correctly
Single throw with proper hand switching from throw 1
Final single throw with proper hand switching from throw 2

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gap after knot tightening

technique_summary: Excellent performance showing consistent improvement from previous attempts with precise suture placement and proper knot tying technique. All required elements executed correctly with good hand switching.
improvement_suggestions: Continue practicing to reduce completion time further
Work on even more precise suture placement to minimize deviation penalties
